## Summary

- What changed and why

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New agent/skill/hook
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Test Plan

- [ ] Tests pass: `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Structure verified: `python -m pytest tests/test_structure.py -v`
- [ ] Install tested: `./install.sh /tmp/test --full --force`
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] No project-specific references (AppiumLens, IntelliJ, etc.)
- [ ] Skills registry updated (if adding/removing skills)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
